seoTitle: Create a Countdown Timer in Canva (Fast Guide)
metaDescription: A quick walkthrough for creating a countdown timer in Canva, from adding the element to styling it for your brand.
intro: This companion guide covers the same core skill as building a countdown timer in Canva, focused on getting a working timer into your design quickly. It's a handy addition for presentations, social posts, and live events where timing matters.

steps.heading: Start a new design
steps.body: Open Canva and create a design in the format you need — social post, video, or presentation.

steps.heading: Add a countdown element
steps.body: Search 'countdown' in Elements and drag the timer graphic onto your canvas.

steps.heading: Configure the end date
steps.body: Set the countdown to finish at the moment your event, sale, or launch begins.

steps.heading: Customize its appearance
steps.body: Adjust the color, size, and font of the timer so it matches the rest of your design.

steps.heading: Export or share your design
steps.body: Share a live link to keep the countdown updating, or export a snapshot for a fixed image.

faq.question: How is this different from other countdown tutorials in Canva?
faq.answer: The underlying feature is the same countdown element — this guide focuses on a quick, no-frills setup.

faq.question: Can I reuse the same countdown design for future events?
faq.answer: Yes, duplicate the design and just update the target date each time.

faq.question: Does the countdown work across devices?
faq.answer: Yes, a shared Canva link with a live countdown updates consistently whether viewed on desktop or mobile.

faq.question: Is there a cost to use the countdown element?
faq.answer: The basic countdown element is available on Canva's free plan.
